title: 05722_Deja_Vu_Contextual_Sparsity_for_Efficient_LLMs_at_Inference_Time
positive_examples: DEJAVU can reduce the inference latency of large language models (LLMs) by over 2× compared to state-of-the-art implementations, making LLMs more accessible for latency-sensitive applications.
The proposed method allows for efficient inference of LLMs without compromising their quality or in-context learning ability, potentially enabling broader use in various applications.
